headline: ERIE INDEMNITY COMPANY-CL A (NASDAQ:ERIE) Stands Out as a Quality Stock with Strong Profitability and Zero Debt
summary: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) passes a strict quality screen with 26.39% ROIC, zero debt, and strong cash conversion. Discover why this insurance services stock is a textbook quality compounder for long-term investors.
